title: Add TTT-LoRA 512d submission (val_bpb=1.1957)
author: santosh5541

data.description: Uses a baseline-sized Transformer with 8 attention heads and 4 KV heads.

novel_contributions: Uses LoRA-based test-time training to improve compression performance.
Shows that the TTT-LoRA evaluation path outperforms the plain int8 roundtrip.
Fits an int8 + zlib artifact within the 16 MB submission limit.
Uses a 512-dimensional baseline Transformer with 8 heads and 4 KV heads under a 10-minute training budget.
